page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Cas-offinder is opencl based, ultrafast and versatile program that searches for potential off-target sites of crispr/cas-derived rna-guided endonucleases (rgen).
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cas-OFFinder is OpenCL based, ultrafast and versatile program that searches for potential off-target sites of CRISPR/Cas-derived RNA-guided endonucleases (RGEN).
